assertions.description: The PCB analyzer correctly reports 191 footprints (100 front, 91 back), 118 SMD and 45 THT parts, 2 copper layers, 2087 track segments, 497 vias, routing_complete=true (0 unrouted nets), and board dimensions of 228.6mm x 79.4mm. The high via count (497) is consistent with the two-sided design requiring many layer transitions for the SMD components on both sides.
